candidates.name: Email Thread Decay Velocity Predictor
candidates.pitch: Tracks open/click patterns from tracking pixels plus thread reply velocity to score likelihood. Uses browser-side signals + optional SMTP integration. Niche gap: no existing extension predicts reply p
candidates.pain: Sales reps waste days on cold email threads that will never reply, lacking signals to prioritize.

candidates.name: LinkedIn Profile Update Change Alert
candidates.pitch: Periodically scrapes watched LinkedIn profiles and alerts on headline, company, location, or bio changes. Uses LinkedIn's public pages. Niche gap: no outreach-specific profile change tracker.
candidates.pain: AEs miss timing outreach when prospects change jobs or get promoted, losing urgency.

candidates.name: Prospect Website Tech Stack Visualizer
candidates.pitch: On site load, fingerprints technology stack (CMS, analytics, hosting, CRM) from script tags and meta headers. Shows badge with stack icons. Built with Wappalyzer-style detection.
candidates.pain: AEs visit prospect sites without knowing what tools they run, missing personalization hooks.

candidates.name: Webhook Payload Encryption Gate
candidates.pitch: Intercepts outbound webhook requests and scans payloads for credit cards, SSNs, API keys, emails. Flags violations before sent. Competitors require manual review or backend scanning.
candidates.pain: Developers accidentally leak PII or secrets in webhook payloads sent to third-party endpoints.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Stripe Revenue Event Accounting Mapper
candidates.pitch: Listens to Stripe webhook events and generates a journal entry mapping for each payment, refund, subscription change. Exports CSV for accounting software. Gap: no browser-side Stripe-to-accounting bri
candidates.pain: Finance teams struggle to map Stripe events to revenue recognition entries manually.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Meeting Recording Chapter Auto-Generator
candidates.pitch: For Google Meet/Zoom local recordings, transcribes audio and segments into topical chapters with timestamps. Uses browser speech-to-text API. Gap: no extension auto-chapters local recordings.
candidates.pain: RevOps teams manually chapter recorded calls for search, wasting hours per week.

candidates.name: Sales Deck Slide Dwell Time Tracker
candidates.pitch: Logs active tab focus time while presenting PDF/HTML deck and generates a heatmap per slide. Uses Page Visibility API. Gap: no lightweight presenter analytics for sales decks.
candidates.pain: AEs don't know which slides resonate or bore prospects during screen-share presentations.

candidates.name: PR Comment Toxicity Sentiment Balancer
candidates.pitch: Analyzes tone of PR comments and shows a dashboard of balance across team members. Built with regex sentiment + LLM fallback. Competition gap: no free tool tracks emotional balance over time in code r
candidates.pain: Code review comments with harsh tone damage team morale and slow PR merges.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: API Response Schema Drift Sentinel
candidates.pitch: Captures live API responses and validates against imported OpenAPI/JSON Schema. Highlights new fields, missing fields, type changes. Built in 3 weeks with existing JSON Schema validators.
candidates.pain: Backend changes break frontend apps silently when API response shapes diverge from contracts.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Browser Console API Call Mistake Detector
candidates.pitch: Injects runtime analyzer in console that flags missing error handling, wrong status code assumptions, and unhandled promise rejections. Lightweight AST parser.
candidates.pain: Junior devs make common HTTP mistakes in frontend code that only surface in production.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: GitHub Issue Duplicate Cluster Detector
candidates.pitch: On GitHub issues page, uses embedding similarity to suggest existing issues that likely cover the same problem. Built with lightweight sentence embeddings. Niche gap: no GitHub-native duplicate detect
candidates.pain: Teams waste time on duplicate GitHub issues that could be merged with existing ones.
